description: Zen Cart 1.2.6d and earlier, under certain PHP configurations, allows remote attackers to obtain sensitive information via direct requests to files in the admin/includes directory, including (1) graphs/banner_daily.php, (2) graphs/banner_infobox.php, (3) graphs/banner_yearly.php, (4) graphs/banner_monthly.php, (5) application_bottom.php, (6) attributes_preview.php, (7) modules/category_product_listing.php, (8) modules/copy_to_confirm.php, (9) modules/delete_product_confirm.php, and (10) modules/move_product_confirm.php, which leaks the web server path in the resulting error message.
